primitive_fields.role: geometric background and variational metric field

action_functional.definition: S[g,phi,A,Psi] = int d^4x sqrt(-g) [ M_Pl^2/2 R - Lambda_0 - alpha_phi/2 g^{mu nu} nabla_mu phi nabla_nu phi - m_phi^2/2 phi^2 - lambda_phi/4 phi^4 - alpha_A/4 F_{mu nu}F^{mu nu} - m_A^2/2 A_mu A^mu - beta_phi_A/2 phi^2 A_mu A^mu - xi_phi/2 R phi^2 - xi_A/2 R_{mu nu} A^mu A^nu ] + S_m[e^{2 gamma_m phi} g_{mu nu}, Psi]
action_functional.field_strength: F_{mu nu} = nabla_mu A_nu - nabla_nu A_mu
action_functional.matter_metric: tilde_g_{mu nu} = e^{2 gamma_m phi} g_{mu nu}

field_equations.metric_equation: M_Pl^2 G_{mu nu} + Lambda_0 g_{mu nu} = T^{matter}_{mu nu} + T^{phi}_{mu nu} + T^{A}_{mu nu} + T^{interaction}_{mu nu} + T^{nonminimal}_{mu nu}
field_equations.scalar_equation: alpha_phi Box_g phi - m_phi^2 phi - lambda_phi phi^3 - beta_phi_A phi A_mu A^mu - xi_phi R phi + gamma_m T_matter = 0
field_equations.vector_equation: alpha_A nabla_mu F^{mu nu} - m_A^2 A^nu - beta_phi_A phi^2 A^nu - xi_A R^{nu}_{ mu} A^mu = 0
field_equations.matter_equation: delta S_m[e^{2 gamma_m phi} g, Psi] / delta Psi = 0
field_equations.stress_energy_definition: T_{mu nu}^{sector} = -2/sqrt(-g) delta S_sector / delta g^{mu nu}
